title: Fix link_crypto test for l2_payload API changes
description: link_crypto/src/main.c uses undeclared functions lichen_l2_payload_classify and lichen_l2_payload_body. These API functions either need to be added to lichen/subsys/lichen/include or the test needs updating to use current APIs.
close_reason: Fixed array-parameter signatures in link_ctx.c, 10/10 tests pass on EC2
